source: AppFolio zohouryproperties - Reporting > Insurance Enforcement + Compliance Feature Flags
current_rows: No Rows To Show — indicates either no unit-level insurance requirement is flagged OR no residents are currently out-of-compliance. Confirms the enforcement module exists but is not actively used by this portfolio.

renters_insurance.interpretation: Portfolio tracks policy enforcement per-lease but is NOT subscribed to AppFolio's paid Insurance add-on (InsuranceAudit + InsuranceUsage are disabled).

affordable_housing_section_8.interpretation: Full Section 8 / HCV / LIHTC compliance stack is enabled — HAP voucher tracking, HUD waitlist, income certs, and tax-credit compliance. Matches the AHA inspection batch observed at Riverwood Club.

data_exports_restricted.interpretation: Raw data-export reports are disabled in this tenant — AP/AR/ledger export is only available via the standard reports, not the bulk data dumps. Typical access tier for a non-enterprise license.

dwellium_mapping_notes.GAP-COMP-02: Insurance Enforcement report schema (6 visible + 10 hidden columns) = direct model for Dwellium Compliance module's Insurance tab. Per-lease boolean + requirement-string + active-coverage-string is the minimum viable schema.
dwellium_mapping_notes.GAP-ASTRA-04: Affordable Housing feature flags confirm: HAP voucher summary + HUD waitlist + Income Certifications + Tax Credit Compliance are distinct sub-reports. Astra's Section 8 ledger should surface at minimum HAP portion + Tenant portion + Voucher status + Income recert date.
dwellium_mapping_notes.GAP-LEASE-03: LeaseRequiresInsurance is a LEASE-LEVEL field (not tenant-level) — Dwellium's lease model needs boolean `requires_insurance` + string `coverage_minimum` + linked `active_policy_id`.
